title: Stabilize root verification commands
description: Ensure root-level check scripts run frontend lint/type/build and backend pytest with predictable output for agent and human review.
acceptanceCriteria: Root commands for check/lint/test exist and are documented
Healthcheck script reports missing files and malformed task schema
CI workflow references the same verification intent

title: Add frontend typecheck and formatting baseline
description: Add explicit frontend typecheck/format commands and fix immediate script gaps so agents can run consistent TS validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent workflow references when to run lint vs typecheck

title: Audit server/client boundaries in App Router pages
description: Review `use client` usage and ensure data fetching/database interactions stay server-safe and API-driven.
acceptanceCriteria: Pages with unnecessary client directives are identified
Any risky boundary violations are documented
Fix plan or safe follow-up tasks are recorded

title: Harden auth/session runtime validation
description: Validate login, token refresh behavior, and authenticated route handling across frontend and backend contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Auth contract mismatches are fixed or documented

title: Backfill backend tests for watchlist and snapshots
description: Increase regression coverage on watchlist endpoints and daily snapshot capture/backfill behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Key watchlist success and error paths are tested
Test commands are captured in run logs

title: Document production environment variable contract
description: Create a clear environment variable matrix for frontend/backend runtime and optional AI integrations without exposing real keys.
acceptanceCriteria: Required vs optional environment variables are separated
No example includes real secret values
Ops notes include safe defaults where possible
